rationale: In the Measures section, the authors explicitly state they used standard procedures to adapt and validate formative scales and cite Diamantopoulos and Winklhofer (2001) for that approach. This citation informs how key constructs are operationalized, not just general background positioning. Even though the cited paper is not central to the theory tests, it has a direct methodological function in the empirical setup.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the cited paper's formative measurement guidance when developing and validating its formative product-perception indexes. The cited work is used as methodological support for construct operationalization in the study.
